text:
This course presents a brief introduction to quarto and shiny.
Quarto is An open-source scientific and technical publishing system.
Shiny is an R package that allows for Easy web apps for data science without the compromises - No web development skills required

Locations
Lectures will be at the Department of Statistical Sciences in via Cesare Battisti 241 Padova, (https://maps.app.goo.gl/JMCthS2eZqWJEnmx8), in room SC20.






Lunch will be served at the University Mensa RistorEsu Nord Piovego in Viale Giuseppe Colombo 1, Padova https://maps.app.goo.gl/Y8ta2wHzbsdn2cMF8
